---
title: "Education"
---
<style>
body {
text-align: justify}
</style>

 **May 2018 - present**<br/> 
  PhD Candidate, Cognitive Sciences.<br/> 
  Department of Linguistics. [Universität Postdam](https://www.uni-potsdam.de/en/ling/index.html), Germany.<br/>
  First Advisor: [Shravan Vasishth](http://www.ling.uni-potsdam.de/~vasishth/).
  
 **2017 - 2018**<br/> 
  Visiting grad student at [NYU Linguistics](http://as.nyu.edu/content/nyu-as/as/departments/linguistics/homepage.html) (USA)
  
 **2016 - 2018**     
  M.A. English Linguistics - [Université Paris Diderot](https://universite.univ-paris-diderot.fr/structures/ufr-etudes-anglophones) (France)<br/> 
  
 **2014 - 2015**   
  Visiting undergrad student at [UVSQ](http://www.uvsq.fr/universite-de-versailles-saint-quentin-en-yvelines-363917.kjsp) (France)<br/> 
  
 **2012 - 2016**         
  B.A. Modern Languages: English and French - [ULPGC](https://www.ulpgc.es/node) (Spain)<br/> 


# Scholarships

- New York University fellowsip from the Graduate School of Arts and Sciences. 9 months. NYU, USA. 2017-2018.
- [MIEM](http://www.sorbonne-paris-cite.fr/en/international/international-mobility/student-mobility/incoming-international-mobility-programme-uspc) (Mobilité Entrante Internationale en Master). 10 months. Paris Diderot University (USPC), France. 2016-2017
- Erasmus+ traineeship mobility, 3 months, [Nailsea Bristol School](nhttp://www.nailseaschool.com), UK. 2016.
- Erasmus+ studentship mobility, 9 months, Université de Versailles Saint Quentin en Yvelines. France. 2014-2015
- Exemption of tuition fees due to academic merits (ULPGC, 2012 – 2013)
